title: Anderbergia vlokii
taxonomy: Anderbergia vlokii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Anderbergia, which is a group of flowering plants native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. This genus is part of the larger clade of plants known as the Asteraceae, which includes a wide range of daisy and sunflower-like species. Anderbergia vlokii is further classified as an endemic species of the Western Cape, found in specific regions with unique geological and climatic conditions. The classification of Anderbergia vlokii is primarily based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics, as well as its distribution and geographic range.
